sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_quota (user_name String, client_key String, queries Int32, execution_time Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_name;
ALTER QUOTA 'test_quota' ON CLUSTER 'my_cluster' FOR user_name 'test_user' SET queries = 123, execution_time = 0.5;
INSERT INTO test_quota (user_name, client_key, queries, execution_time) VALUES ('test_user', 'client_001', 50, 0.2);
UPDATE test_quota SET queries = 200 WHERE user_name = 'test_user';
